mapper.sql: user_id, preference_text, preference_vector, last_action_id, last_behavior_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_preference_profile
preference_text = #{bean.preferenceText},
preference_vector = #{bean.preferenceVector, jdbcType=BLOB},
last_action_id = #{bean.lastActionId},
last_behavior_time = #{bean.lastBehaviorTime},
update_time = #{bean.updateTime},
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
